title: Teacher Gifts for Women Men, Teacher Christmas Gifts, 14oz Grey Ceramic Coffee Mug Teachers Gift Teacher's Day Profosser Mentor Gift with Prensent Box, Golden Spoon, Greeting Card
features: 【Best Teacher Appreciation Gifts for Men】 A teacher mug is the perfect teacher gift for teachers in End of Year. This present recognizes a teacher who be good for student. Whether you are a parent, or a student, you can show your appreciation with this teacher mug. The gray mug is perfect for men. Ideal for gift giving on birthdays, teacher's day, graduation, Christmas, and Thanksgiving.

【Quality & Design】 Male teachers will prefer gray, so we made this mug for gray and gold. The material is made of high quality ceramic, the design are hand-painted design by the designer and printed in gold, which emphasizes the exquisite preciousness of the gift. 14oz mug can meet the daily use, suitable for office or home.

【Sturdy and Beautiful Gift Box】 Carefully packaged in a high-end gift box with a satin cloth that is guaranteed never to break. The box contains a cup lid, spoon and greeting card. The gift makes gift-giving a breeze. This is a great gift for mentors, professors as graduation gifts, Christmas gifts, birthday gifts and more. Unlike the ordinary boxes, we procured expensive fall protection and moisture resistant gift boxes.

【Professional and Trustworthy】 We have been in the ceramic industry for more than 20 years, our designers have a wealth of inspired designs and our factory has exquisite production processes. Because ceramic mugs are timeless, we think they are more meaningful as gifts. In addition, we specialize in sourcing adobe and producing ceramic mugs in Jiangxi Province, a traditional Chinese ceramic region.

【100% After-sale Service】Each ceramic Mug of Doublewhale has been selected four times, and products of substandard quality are never allowed to flow into the hands of customers. If the product is damaged due to improper operation during transportation, please contact us without hesitation, you do not even have to send it back, you will get a refund or new one.
description: From the brand Previous page Doublewhale focuses on porcelain kitchenware since 1990th, our products range from dinnerware, drinkware to novelty. We have very experienced designers and technicians. For mug series, our core value is to make every mug a work of art. We take care of every detail from materials to the final products inspection to make sure that each product we deliver to our customer is a perfect one.
